notes: Keep the dome, tops, launch vectors, clashes, trails, rim pressure, and effects on the top pane.
The top pane should not be blocked by parts-bench or shop UI in dual-screen mode.

bottom.role: parts bench, shop, mode select, rank state, and match HUD
notes: Use the bottom pane for parts tuning, shop actions, mode selection, HP, charge, cash, and match receipts.
Touch tuning is allowed here, but PvP controls must remain keyboard and controller friendly.

controls.touch: bottom-pane mode, shop, and parts tuning controls
notes: One full CPU or local PvP round must be playable without touchscreen-only actions.

requiredReceipts: stacked-ds layout shows dome above parts/HUD panel
foldable or simulated segment layout keeps arena and tuning separated
RGDS Android mode device receipt before marking verified
one full round reaches win/loss/rematch or shop state
